replies.msg:

第三季留下既疑問


1. Ellie 會唔會真係去左Florida ?


2.Candace 被 Joe 活埋後究竟去咗邊？


3. Love 最後如何處置 Candace`s body?


4. 真正個個 Will 會唔會番黎？


5. Joe 媽媽最後發生咩事？


6. Love 其實有無kill her husband

Penn Badgley seems to confirm that Season 3 is happening.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SgQWwWDYV0c

- Season 3 would shoot in California.
- The cast is definitely going to include Victoria Pedretti and Penn Badgley.Badgley basically confirmed Joe and Love are going to figure some things out, so we can expect to see their faces again.
- [i]Premiere date.We have no details yet, but we're guessing it'll premiere around this time in 2020.[/i]
